title: poa hiemata
intro: Poa hiemata, also known as the snow grass, is a species of grass that grows in the mountainous regions of New Zealand. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Poa hiemata include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to aid in the treatment of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
